## Process Agent Shortcuts (AI-ILC Generated)

The following shortcut invokes the AI-ILC governance agent. Type the shortcut anywhere in a chat prompt — the corresponding agent activates immediately. No further clarification needed.

**How it works:** The shortcut is a direct command. When the AI sees it in your prompt, it loads the corresponding agent from `.kiro/agents/` and executes its full check pass.

### Active Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Agent | When to Call | Tier |
|----------|-------|-------------|:----:|
| `IQC__` | `idea-quality-agent` — Idea Quality Check | After idea evaluation, before handoff to next package | 1 |

### Shortcut Rules

1. **`IQC__` triggers Idea Quality Check.** When the user types `IQC__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/idea-quality-agent.md` and execute its full check pass. No clarification needed — treat `IQC__` as a direct command to run the agent.

### When to Call

Call `IQC__` at these process milestones:

| Milestone | Why |
|-----------|-----|
| After Stage 6 (Route & Handoff) | Validates the complete idea brief before destination handoff |
| After Evaluate stage (Stage 3) | Mid-workflow checkpoint — ensures scoring is solid before scoping |
| Before AI-PILC handoff | Confirms the Approved Idea Brief is AI-PILC-ready |
| Before AI-POLC handoff | Confirms the Feature Brief is AI-POLC-ready |

### What Happens If You Don't Call It

The idea brief may contain:
- Missing evaluation scores (decision not defensible)
- Incomplete problem statement (downstream packages confused)
- Unlogged approval decision (audit trail gap at idea stage)
- Route without rationale (receiving package doesn't know why it arrived)

The initiation quality agent (AI-PILC) checks PIP quality, but it cannot retroactively validate the idea-stage decisions that fed into it.

### Quick Guide

For full documentation on the idea quality checks, what happens if you skip, and how to recover, see:

> **`.governance/AGENT-GUIDE.md`** — the combined process agent user manual (AI-ILC section).
